name: @welluable/orch
description: CLI orchestrator: triage → research → plan → implement

scripts.commit: agn 'commit with a detailed message and push'
scripts.docs: orch --quick 'Update README.md and orch --help so they match the current CLI. Only update what changes and add what is missing.' --agent agn
scripts.release: orch --quick 'Bump the minor version in package.json and package-lock.json, then publish to npm.' --agent agn
